summary: UI Wiring Audit for Konekt B2B Admin Sidebar - All navigation and role configurations verified. Sidebar correctly shows Catalog & Supply (with Vendor Ops, Supply Review), Finance (with Commission Engine), and all 11 roles on Users page.

integration_issues.issue: vendor_ops user (vops.test@konekt.co.tz) redirects to /account instead of /admin on login. User has valid vendor_ops role and can access admin APIs with token, but frontend login flow treats them as regular customer.
integration_issues.note: This may be intentional - vendor_ops users might need to use a separate admin login URL or the login flow needs to check for admin-level roles (admin, sales, sales_manager, finance_manager, marketing, production, vendor_ops, staff)

issues: React console warning: 'Encountered two children with the same key' - appears multiple times. Minor, does not affect functionality.
React console warning: 'Each child in a list should have a unique key prop' - minor, does not affect functionality.

action_items: Consider updating login flow to redirect vendor_ops/staff roles to /admin instead of /account, OR document that these users should use a separate admin login URL
critical_code_review_comments: adminNavigation.js correctly defines Catalog & Supply section with Catalog, Vendor Ops, Supply Review, Product Approvals
Finance section correctly includes Commission Engine, Affiliate Commissions, Affiliate Payouts
vendor_ops role correctly added to ALL_MGMT array and Catalog & Supply, Operations sections
AdminLayout.js role filtering at line 214 correctly filters sidebar based on user role
All 11 roles visible on Users page: Admin, Sales, Sales Manager, Finance, Marketing, Production, Vendor Ops, Staff, Affiliate, Vendor, Customer
context_for_next_testing_agent: UI wiring audit complete. All sidebar navigation working correctly for admin user. vendor_ops user exists (Jane Vendor - vops.test@konekt.co.tz) with correct role but login redirects to customer portal. Admin APIs accessible with vendor_ops token.
